items.name: Sunita Devi
items.text: Mere pati ke jaane ke baad Ajay sir ne 45 din mein ₹25 lakh ka claim dilwaya. Unke bina yeh possible nahi hota.

items.name: Ramesh Gupta
items.text: Bachche ki padhai ke liye 15 saal pehle Ajay sir ne plan banaya tha. Aaj mera beta IIT mein hai. Thank you sir.

items.name: Alok Srivastava
items.text: Hospital mein ₹3.8 lakh ka bill aaya. Star Health ne 7 din mein cashless settle kar diya. Ajay sir ne plan sahi choose karaya tha.

items.name: Devendra Singh
items.text: After retiring as a teacher, I was worried about regular expenses. Ajay sir set up a pension plan that ensures a guaranteed income hits my bank account on the 1st of every month.

items.name: Rahul Verma
items.text: At 25, I wanted to secure my parents' future. Ajay sir explained term insurance clearly and helped me get a large cover at a very affordable premium. The online process was seamless.

items.name: Sanjay Agrawal
items.text: When my business partner passed away unexpectedly, our Keyman Insurance policy kept our company stable. Ajay sir handled the entire claim and helped save the jobs of our 15 employees.

items.name: Kiran Tripathi
items.text: I had started a small saving plan for my daughter 18 years ago on Ajay sir's advice. The policy matured just before her wedding, allowing us to manage all expenses without taking any loans.

items.name: Vikram Malhotra
items.text: Living in Dubai, managing my parents' health and life policies in Gorakhpur was a challenge. Ajay sir takes care of everything end-to-end, from premium reminders to offline support, with complete honesty.

items.name: Sunita Verma
items.text: Ajay sir's advice on LIC Jeevan Anand has secured my family's future completely. His dedication to service is exceptional.

items.name: Rakesh Agarwal
items.text: I invested in LIC's ULIP under Ajay sir's guidance. The returns and life cover balance are perfect for my wealth goals.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.text: Ajay Kumar Poddar helped me choose LIC Jeevan Labh. He explained the tax benefits and maturity terms so clearly in Hindi.

items.name: Mohit Gupta
items.text: We took a Star Health insurance policy through Ajay sir. His premium calculation was accurate, and the cashless claim process was seamless.

items.name: Kavita Singh
items.text: LIC Jeevan Utsav recommended by Ajay sir is giving me a guaranteed lifetime regular income. He is the most honest advisor I've met.

faq.heroSubtitle: Find clear, honest answers about LIC policies, Star Health insurance, claim settlements, and our 31-year wealth advisory legacy in Gorakhpur.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Ask Poddar Ji, our 24/7 AI insurance advisor, trained on 31 years of on-ground financial expertise.

general.a: Ajay Kumar Poddar is a veteran financial advisor with over 31 years of experience. He is a prestigious Million Dollar Round Table (MDRT, USA) Member and a premier LIC Chairman's Club Member. Based in Gorakhpur, he and his team have protected over 5,000 families with ethical, on-ground insurance and retirement planning.

general.q: Is Poddar Wealth Management an insurance company?
general.a: No. Poddar Wealth Management is an authorized premier financial advisory firm. We are official partners with the Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) and Star Health Insurance, meaning we help you choose the best plans and provide end-to-end claim support, at no extra cost to you.
You can call Mr. Ajay Kumar Poddar directly at 9415313434, or send a message on WhatsApp. You can also visit our Gorakhpur office located at AD Mall Compound, Vijay Chowk, Gorakhpur, U.P. 273001.

general.q: Is my data safe with you?
general.a: Yes, absolutely. We take data privacy extremely seriously. We use secure endpoints to handle your details and never sell, trade, or share your personal information with third-party telemarketers. All details are kept strictly confidential for policy and advisory purposes only.

Our primary physical service region is Gorakhpur, Deoria, Kushinagar, Maharajganj, and surrounding Eastern UP districts. However, through digitized processes, we successfully serve LIC and Star Health clients across Uttar Pradesh and pan-India.

lic.q: Which LIC plan is best for me?
lic.a: The best plan depends on your financial goals. For pure family protection, a term plan like LIC Jeevan Amar is best. For guaranteed savings and protection, New Jeevan Anand or Jeevan Umang are excellent. You can use our Premium Calculator or consult Mr. Ajay Poddar for a tailored recommendation.

Term insurance (such as LIC Jeevan Amar) is pure life protection. It offers the maximum life cover (Sum Assured) at the lowest possible premium. It does not have a maturity benefit, making it the most efficient tool to secure your family's future income if something happens to you.

An endowment plan (like LIC New Jeevan Anand) combines life protection with guaranteed savings. You pay premiums for a selected term, and if you survive the term, you receive the full Sum Assured plus accumulated LIC bonuses. If death occurs during the term, the nominee receives the death benefit.

lic.q: How do I check my LIC policy status?
lic.a: You can check your status online via the official LIC Customer Portal or by downloading the LIC Customer App. Alternatively, you can call Ajay sir or our support team with your policy number, and we will fetch the live status, premium due dates, and maturity details for you.

health.q: Why should I choose Star Health Insurance?
health.a: Star Health is India's largest standalone health insurance company. They offer a vast network of 14,000+ cashless hospitals, high claim settlement ratios, dedicated in-house doctors, and specialized plans for diabetes, cardiac care, and senior citizens without mandatory pre-policy medical screenings.

health.q: What does a health insurance policy cover?
health.a: A standard health policy covers indoor hospitalization expenses, room rent, ICU charges, surgeon fees, medicines, day-care procedures, pre-hospitalization (up to 60 days), and post-hospitalization care (up to 90 days). Modern plans also include modern treatments, organ donor costs, and road ambulance cover.

health.q: Can my elderly parents be covered under health insurance?
health.a: Yes. Star Health offers dedicated senior citizen plans like 'Red Carpet' designed for parents aged 60 to 75 years. These plans cover pre-existing diseases with shorter waiting periods and do not require pre-policy medical checkups in most cases, making them highly accessible.

claims.q: How do I file a claim during an emergency?
claims.a: We offer a direct 4-step claim process. First, call Ajay sir directly at 9415313434 to inform about the hospitalization or event. Second, collect the required documents. Third, we verify and submit the paperwork. Fourth, we track the settlement. For detailed instructions, visit our dedicated claims support page.

claims.q: How long does the claim settlement take?
claims.a: For health insurance, cashless approvals at network hospitals usually take 2 to 4 hours. For life insurance death claims, once all mandatory documents are submitted to the LIC branch, it takes an average of 45 days for full settlement directly into the nominee's bank account.

claims.q: What documents are required to file a claim?
claims.a: Key documents include the original policy bond, claimant's ID & address proof, nominee's bank details (cancelled cheque), and the official claim form. For life claims, the death certificate is required. For health claims, hospital discharge summaries and bills are needed. View our claims page for a complete checklist.

criticalIllness.heroTitle: Lump Sum Cover for Life's Biggest Health Challenges
criticalIllness.heroSubtitle: Focus on recovery, not medical bills, with guaranteed massive cash payouts.
criticalIllness.benefitsTitle: Complete Financial Shield Against Critical Ailments
benefits: Get a lump sum payout immediately upon diagnosis of cancer, heart attack, or major diseases
Protect your life savings from high treatment costs and medical inflation
Clear outstanding loans and home liabilities during the recovery period
Avail full cashless hospital access at over 12,000+ top network hospitals
criticalIllness.advisorText: Medical inflation in India is rising at 14% annually. A major diagnosis like cancer or a bypass surgery doesn't just impact health. It can wipe out a lifetime of family savings. A critical illness plan guarantees a massive tax-free cash payout upon diagnosis, ensuring you get top-tier hospital care.

mobileCTABar.whatsappText: Hello Ajay sir, I need help with insurance.

personalAccident.heroSubtitle: Financial security when life throws unexpected challenges. Protect your family's income against accidental death and disability.
personalAccident.whyTitle: Why You Need Personal Accident Protection
personalAccident.whatIsIt: Accidents happen without warning. While health insurance covers hospital bills, it does not replace lost income due to disability. Personal accident insurance pays a lump sum to support your family if you are unable to work.
covers: Lump sum payment of 100% sum assured in case of accidental death
Payouts up to 100% for permanent total or partial disability like loss of limbs
Coverage for hospitalization charges and medical bills arising from an accident
personalAccident.whoNeeds: Daily commuters, field workers, and self-employed professionals need this protection the most. In my 31 years of experience, I have seen how an accident can derail a family's finances. I recommend this for every earning member.
personalAccident.plansText: You can opt for riders like the LIC Accidental Death and Disability Benefit Rider. Standalone plans like the Star Health Accident Care Policy also offer excellent benefits. These plans are affordable, costing around ₹200 to ₹500 per year for a ₹10 lakh cover.
personalAccident.diffTitle: How it Differs from Life Insurance
personalAccident.diffText: Life insurance pays your family only in case of death. Personal accident insurance covers both death and living disabilities. It helps you manage house expenses and medical bills while you recover.
personalAccident.claimsText: To claim, inform the company immediately. Submit the First Information Report (FIR), hospital bills, and a medical certificate from a government doctor. Ajay sir will help you handle all the paperwork.

cancerCover.heroTitle: Cancer Insurance, Early Detection Saves Lives & Money
cancerCover.heroSubtitle: Do not let cancer drain your hard-earned life savings. Secure payouts on early and major stage diagnosis.
cancerCover.whyTitle: Why Standalone Cancer Cover is Essential
cancerCover.whyText: Cancer treatment costs in India range from ₹5 lakh to ₹30 lakh. Standard health insurance often falls short or runs out quickly. A dedicated cancer cover pays a lump sum to help you seek the best treatment.
features: Lump sum payouts on early detection to start treatment early
Waiver of future premiums if diagnosed with early-stage cancer
100% payout of the sum assured on major stage detection
cancerCover.plansTitle: LIC and Star Health Cancer Plans
cancerCover.plansText: The LIC Cancer Cover plan provides fixed benefits that do not depend on actual hospital bills. Star Health also offers dedicated cancer care policies. Premiums are low when you are young and remain fixed for the policy term.
cancerCover.stageText: Early-stage diagnosis pays 25% of the sum assured and waives premiums for three years. Advanced-stage detection pays 100% of the sum assured. This lump sum can be used for travel, therapy, or regular home bills.
cancerCover.howItWorksText: Health insurance pays hospital bills directly. Cancer cover pays you a lump sum cash benefit. You can use this money for daily household expenses, loan EMIs, or treatment not covered by your health plan.

termLife.heroTitle: Term Life Insurance, Maximum Protection at Lowest Cost
termLife.heroSubtitle: Pure protection with no maturity value. Secure a massive financial cover for your family at an affordable price.
termLife.whyTitle: Why Everyone Under 45 Needs Term Cover
termLife.whyText: If you have dependents, you need term insurance. It is the cheapest way to secure your family's future. In my experience, buying a plan early locks in low premiums that stay same for life.
termLife.ruleText: I recommend keeping your sum assured at least 10 times your annual income. If your yearly salary is ₹10 lakh, your term cover must be at least ₹1 crore. This ensures your family can pay off loans and live comfortably.
termLife.plansTitle: LIC Tech Term vs e-Term Comparison
termLife.plansText: LIC Tech Term is an online-only plan with lower premiums and simple processing. LIC e-Term is also popular. Both offer the reliability of LIC's high claim settlement ratio, which is above 98.6%.
riders: Accidental death rider for extra payout in case of accidents
Critical illness rider that pays a lump sum on major illness diagnosis
Waiver of premium rider to keep cover active if you get disabled

groupHealth.heroTitle: Group Health Insurance for Companies & Families
groupHealth.heroSubtitle: Protect your team or your entire family under a single floater plan. Save on premiums while getting quality healthcare.
groupHealth.whyTitle: Why Employer Cover is Not Enough
groupHealth.whyText: Corporate health insurance only covers you while you are employed there. If you change jobs, start a business, or retire, you are left with zero cover. You must have a personal health insurance backup.
groupHealth.familyText: A family floater covers your spouse, kids, and parents under one policy. It is cheaper than buying separate covers. Star Health family plans offer excellent floater benefits for local families.
groupHealth.plansText: Star Health is the leader in health insurance, offering fast cashless claims. LIC also offers health protection plans. We help you choose the right sum assured based on your family's age and health history.
features: Room rent limits to avoid high out-of-pocket room charges
Co-payment terms that define how much you pay during claims
No-claim bonus which increases your coverage limit for free
